response.justification: Mohammed has strong full-stack engineering experience, exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, and a proven track record in building scalable systems — but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and clear leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven ability to lead full-stack development across diverse tech stacks and domains
Active open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops and talks
concerns: No clear documentation of 8+ years specifically in production AI systems; most roles are general software engineering
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization metrics
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise cloud AI deployment

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI-Specific Production Track Record
